glosses.ro: a face surf; a naviga pe internet
glosses.ja: サーフィンする; ネットサーフィンする

translations.es: Vamos a hacer surf esta tarde.
translations.fr: On va faire du surf cet après-midi.
translations.it: Andiamo a fare surf questo pomeriggio.
translations.ru: Сегодня днём мы пойдём кататься на серфе.
translations.vi: Chiều nay chúng tôi đi lướt sóng.
translations.hi: आज दोपहर हम सर्फिंग करने जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το απόγευμα πάμε για σέρφινγκ.
translations.ro: Astăzi după-amiază mergem să facem surf.
translations.da: I eftermiddag skal vi ud at surfe.
translations.ja: 今日の午後はサーフィンしに行く。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural, nominative) functioning as the subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb (present), verb of motion; takes a bare infinitive complement ('surfen') in the construction 'gehen + V' to indicate going to perform an activity.
Temporal adverb modifying the clause; specifies the day.
Common noun used as part of a temporal adverbial ('heute Nachmittag'); time adjunct without article.
Bare infinitive verb complement (xcomp) selected by 'gehen'; denotes the activity to be performed.

sentences.target: Ich will noch kurz im Internet surfen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç vɪl nɔx kʊʁts ɪm ˈɪntɐnɛt ˈzœʁfən/

translations.de: Ich will noch kurz im Internet surfen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç vɪl nɔx kʊʁts ɪm ˈɪntɐnɛt ˈzœʁfən/
translations.en: I want to surf the internet for a bit.
translations.es: Quiero navegar por internet un rato.
translations.fr: Je veux surfer un peu sur Internet.
translations.it: Voglio navigare su internet per un po'.
translations.pt: Quero navegar na internet um pouco.
translations.vi: Tôi muốn lướt mạng một lát.
translations.nl: Ik wil even op internet surfen.
translations.hi: मुझे थोड़ी देर इंटरनेट चलाना है.
translations.el: Θέλω να σερφάρω λίγο στο ίντερνετ.
translations.nb: Jeg vil surfe litt på nettet.
translations.id: Aku mau berselancar di internet sebentar.
translations.sv: Jag vill surfa lite på nätet.
translations.ro: Vreau să navighez puțin pe internet.
translations.da: Jeg vil surfe lidt på nettet.
translations.ja: ちょっとネットを見たい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative) functioning as the subject of the modal.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1st person singular) selecting a bare infinitive ('surfen') to express desire/intention.
Temporal/aspectual adverb indicating continuation ('still/yet'); modifies the clause/activity.
Manner adverb indicating short duration; modifies the activity.
Preposition fused with definite article (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces the locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im', indicating the location/context of the activity.
Bare infinitive verb complement (xcomp) selected by the modal 'will'.

translations.en: Lisa is learning to surf right now.
translations.es: Lisa está aprendiendo a surfear ahora.
translations.fr: Lisa est en train d'apprendre à faire du surf.
translations.it: Lisa sta imparando a fare surf adesso.
translations.pt: Lisa está aprendendo a surfar agora.
translations.tr: Lisa şu anda sörf yapmayı öğreniyor.
translations.hi: लिसा अभी सर्फिंग सीख रही है.
translations.el: Η Λίζα τώρα μαθαίνει να κάνει σέρφινγκ.
translations.nb: Lisa lærer å surfe akkurat nå.
translations.sv: Lisa lär sig surfa just nu.
translations.ro: Lisa învață să facă surf chiar acum.
translations.da: Lisa lærer at surfe lige nu.
translations.ja: リサは今、サーフィンを習っている。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun; subject of the finite verb.
Finite main verb (present, 3rd person singular); takes a bare infinitive complement ('surfen') to express learning an activity.
Temporal adverb indicating the action is ongoing at the moment.
Bare infinitive verb complement (xcomp) of 'lernt'; specifies the skill being learned.

sentences.target: Zu Hause darf ich nur eine Stunde surfen.
sentences.reading: /tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə daʁf ɪç nuːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtʊndə ˈzœʁfən/

translations.de: Zu Hause darf ich nur eine Stunde surfen.
translations.ipa: /tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə daʁf ɪç nuːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃtʊndə ˈzœʁfən/
translations.en: At home I’m only allowed to surf for one hour.
translations.es: En casa solo me dejan navegar por internet una hora.
translations.fr: À la maison, je n’ai droit qu’à une heure sur Internet.
translations.it: A casa posso stare su internet solo per un’ora.
translations.ko: 집에서는 인터넷을 한 시간만 할 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 在家我只能上网一小时。
translations.yue: 喺屋企我只可以上網一個鐘。
translations.ru: Дома мне можно сидеть в интернете только один час.
translations.pt: Em casa só posso ficar na internet por uma hora.
translations.he: בבית מותר לי לגלוש רק שעה.
translations.tr: Evde sadece bir saat internette gezinebilirim.
translations.vi: Ở nhà tôi chỉ được lướt mạng một tiếng.
translations.ar: في البيت يُسمح لي بتصفح الإنترنت لمدة ساعة فقط.
translations.nl: Thuis mag ik maar één uur op internet.
translations.uk: Вдома мені дозволяють сидіти в інтернеті лише одну годину.
translations.hi: घर पर मुझे सिर्फ एक घंटे के लिए इंटरनेट चलाने की अनुमति है.
translations.pl: W domu wolno mi surfować w internecie tylko przez godzinę.
translations.el: Στο σπίτι μου επιτρέπεται να είμαι στο ίντερνετ μόνο για μία ώρα.
translations.nb: Hjemme får jeg bare være på nettet i én time.
translations.id: Di rumah aku cuma boleh internetan selama satu jam.
translations.sv: Hemma får jag bara vara på nätet i en timme.
translations.ro: Acasă am voie să stau pe internet doar o oră.
translations.cs: Doma smím být na internetu jen jednu hodinu.
translations.da: Hjemme må jeg kun være på nettet i en time.
translations.fi: Kotona saan olla netissä vain tunnin.
translations.ja: 家ではネットは1時間しかできない。

tokens.explanation: Preposition used with dative; part of the fixed locative expression 'zu Hause' meaning 'at home'.
Common noun (dative form); with 'zu' forms the adverbial PP 'zu Hause' functioning as a locative adjunct.
Modal auxiliary (present); selects a bare infinitive ('surfen') to express permission.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular, nominative); subject of the modal verb.
Focus/limiting adverb that restricts scope; here limits the duration to a single hour.
Cardinal numeral quantifying the measure noun 'Stunde'; part of a duration expression.
Measure noun; together with 'eine' forms a duration adverbial ('nur eine Stunde').
Bare infinitive verb complement (xcomp) selected by the modal 'darf'; denotes the permitted activity.
